Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Interface IHypAction

All Known Subinterfaces:
IHypAction.IForwardInfHypAction, IHypAction.IRewriteHypAction, IHypAction.ISelectionHypAction, IInternalHypAction
All Known Implementing Classes:
ForwardInfHypAction, RewriteHypAction, SelectionHypAction
public interface IHypAction
Interface describing the information stored in a IHypAction object.

An object of this type is typically attached to a rule antecedent. They describe operations that *may* be performed on the hypotheses of a sequent in case the stated hypotheses exist.

The action type denotes the type of action to be performed:

    • A selection action alters the selection information in the set of hypotheses (i.e. select, deselect, hide, show)
        A forward inference action performs a forward inference on a set of hypotheses.

        Objects of this type are typically generated inside reasoners by calling a factory method.

    • Since:
    1.0
    See Also:
    • IProofRule.IAntecedent
    • ProverFactory

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes
      Modifier and Type
      Interface
      Description
      static interface 
      IHypAction.IForwardInfHypAction
      Interface implemented by hypothesis actions that perform forward inference on the hypotheses in a sequent.
      static interface 
      IHypAction.IRewriteHypAction
      Interface implemented by hypothesis actions that perform forward inference on some sequent hypotheses, and then hide some of them.
      static interface 
      IHypAction.ISelectionHypAction
      Interface implemented by hypothesis actions that change the selection information of hypotheses in a sequent.

    • Method Summary

      Modifier and Type
      Method
      Description
      String
      getActionType()
      Returns the action type of the hypothesis action.
      IHypAction
      translate(FormulaFactory factory)
      Translates this hyp action using the given formula factory.

    • Method Details

      • getActionType

        String getActionType()
        Returns the action type of the hypothesis action. This may be one of the action types defined in this file.
        Returns:
        The action type of this hypothesis action

      • translate

        IHypAction translate(FormulaFactory factory)
        Translates this hyp action using the given formula factory.
        Parameters:
        factory - the destination formula factory
        Returns:
        the translated hyp action
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if the translation fails
        Since:
        3.0
